title: Onboarding Orchestrator
problem_or_desire: Fragmented onboarding processes leading to poor new-hire experience and administrative bottlenecks.
core_concept: An agent that manages cross-platform provisioning, scheduling, and document collection across disparate SaaS tools.
proposed_approach: Use API-based automation to trigger workflows in Slack, email, and HRIS systems based on hire status.
prototype_scope: A workflow that automatically creates a Slack channel, sends a welcome email, and assigns a task in a project management tool for one new hire.

title: GiftGuard
problem_or_desire: Losing track of birthdays, anniversary-gift history, and social relationship nuances
core_concept: Categorized gift tracking by relationship tier.
proposed_approach: A simple CRM for personal relationships to track gift history.
prototype_scope: A profile vault for contacts with gift history fields. | Build a contact list; Add fields for gift history; Implement a simple search/filter

title: Syntax Storm
target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
core_concept: Combat strategy built on cleaning buggy code snippets.
proposed_approach: A puzzle game where players fix buggy code snippets to defeat enemies in a grid-based combat system.
prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments. | Design two buggy code snippets; Implement basic grid combat logic; Build simple UI for code repair

title: Hyper-Local Micro-Catering
problem_or_desire: Difficulty finding high-quality, small-batch catering that isn't fast food.
core_concept: A marketplace connecting home-based professional chefs with small office teams.
proposed_approach: Curate a platform for local chefs to offer 'office-sized' lunch platters delivered via bike courier.
prototype_scope: A landing page for one neighborhood matching three chefs with five local businesses for a one-week trial.

title: Pantry Potioneer
target_user: Home cooks trying to minimize food waste
problem_or_desire: Managing quickly expiring ingredients that end up in the trash
core_concept: RPG fantasy loop where inventory management is tied to real-world pantry items.
proposed_approach: An RPG where players manually input their pantry items to gain equipment traits for a fantasy battle.
prototype_scope: An inventory screen where users select from ten basic produce items to assign offensive ability slots. | Design ten produce items and their traits; Implement manual inventory selection UI; Build simple battle loop

title: Echo Archive
target_user: History buffs and collaborative world builders
problem_or_desire: Disconnected storytelling platforms for regional historical facts
core_concept: Location-based storytelling that overlays historical narratives onto modern landscapes.
proposed_approach: A location-based app that triggers audio clips when a user reaches specific, pre-defined coordinates in a city.
prototype_scope: A single city square map with one tethered narrative mission triggered by GPS proximity. | Implement basic GPS geofencing; Record and integrate one audio narrative; Build simple map interface

title: Multi-Channel Feedback Resolver
problem_or_desire: Rapid identification of recurring regional training lapses reported in informal channels.
core_concept: Parsing and normalizing sentiment trends across messy Yelp reviews, physical location comment cards, and SMS responses.
proposed_approach: An aggregation engine detects semantic trends indicating training issues and issues digest reports specifically for site managers.
prototype_scope: Input normalization agent for two disparate survey feedback databases focused purely on categorization performance.

title: Corporate Sensory Break Kits
problem_or_desire: Need to boost morale during remote workforce burnout via shared, multi-sensory team rituals
core_concept: Curated monthly discovery experience delivered at home, connecting employees virtually through live tasting calibration sessions
proposed_approach: Coordinating timed arrival of proprietary cupping samples so team units begin simultaneous tasting led by remote sensors or virtual coaching
prototype_scope: Hosting three virtual events involving manual sensory tracking surveys provided at delivery via paper form

title: Sustainable E-commerce Packaging Sourcing
problem_or_desire: Difficulty finding affordable, small-batch sustainable packaging
core_concept: A group-buying platform that aggregates orders to reach wholesale pricing for eco-friendly materials
proposed_approach: A platform that pools orders from multiple shops to negotiate bulk rates with manufacturers
prototype_scope: A landing page collecting interest for a specific type of compostable mailer

title: Pop-up Restaurant Exchange
problem_or_desire: High overhead costs for restaurants during off-peak hours.
core_concept: A platform that matches daytime-only cafes with evening-only pop-up chefs.
proposed_approach: Facilitate short-term lease agreements and insurance coverage for evening kitchen usage.
prototype_scope: One cafe hosting three different pop-up chefs over three consecutive weekends.
